name: update_calibration_scheme
full_help:
update_calibration_scheme

Description: 
Updates calibration scheme.

Syntax: 
update_calibration_scheme  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories:

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
